questions.question: Hair shaft ka outermost layer kya kehlata hai?
questions.explanation: Hair shaft ka outermost protective layer cuticle hota hai.

questions.question: Human hair primarily kis protein se bana hota hai?
questions.explanation: Hair, nails aur skin ka major component Keratin protein hi hota hai.

questions.question: Hair growth ke teen main stages kya hain?
questions.explanation: Hair growth cycle mein Anagen (growth), Catagen (transition), aur Telogen (resting/shedding) stages hote hain.

questions.question: Kis hair type mein Keratin treatment ke results sabse zyada noticeable hote hain?
questions.explanation: Coarse aur curly hair mein Keratin treatment se frizz reduction aur smoothness sabse zyada dikhta hai.

questions.question: Hair porosity kis cheez ko refer karta hai?

options.C: Hair ki moisture absorb karne ki capacity

questions.explanation: Hair porosity decide karta hai ki hair kitni easily moisture absorb aur retain kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Scalp par dandruff hone ka main reason kya ho sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Dandruff ka common reason dry scalp ya Malassezia naam ka fungus hota hai.

questions.question: Hair shaft ke kis part mein melanin pigments hote hain jo hair colour determine karte hain?
questions.explanation: Cortex hair shaft ka middle layer hota hai jisme melanin granules hote hain jo hair colour dete hain.

questions.question: Keratin treatment ke liye kis type ke hair bonds ko temporarily modify kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Keratin treatment primarily hydrogen bonds aur salt bonds ko modify karta hai, disulfide bonds ko nahi, jo chemical straightening mein hote hain.

questions.question: Alkaline pH products hair cuticle par kya effect karte hain?

options.C: Cuticle ko swell aur open karte hain

questions.explanation: Alkaline products hair cuticle ko swell aur open karte hain, allowing products to penetrate.

questions.question: Hair elasticity se kya matlab hai?

options.B: Hair ki strength aur stretch hone ki ability

questions.explanation: Hair elasticity hair ki stretch hone aur original shape mein wapas aane ki ability hai.

questions.question: Scalp ki kis condition mein Keratin treatment recommend nahi kiya jaata?
questions.explanation: Scalp infections ya open sores hone par koi bhi chemical treatment avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Hair density kya hoti hai?

options.C: Ek square inch area mein kitne hair strands hain

questions.explanation: Hair density refers to the number of individual hair strands on one square inch of scalp.

questions.question: Medulla hair shaft ke kis part mein paya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Medulla hair shaft ka innermost core hota hai, jo sabhi hair types mein present nahi hota.

questions.question: Trichology kis cheez ki study hai?
questions.explanation: Trichology hair aur scalp ki scientific study hai, jisme unki structure, function aur diseases shamil hain.

questions.question: Agar client ka hair low porosity ka hai, toh Keratin treatment ke product absorption ke liye kya karna hoga?

options.A: Product ko kam time ke liye apply karna
options.B: Hair ko thoda heat karna ya product ko longer time ke liye rakhna

questions.explanation: Low porosity hair mein cuticle tightly packed hota hai, product penetration ke liye mild heat ya longer processing time ki zaroorat pad sakti hai.

questions.question: Hair shaft ki health aur strength ke liye kaun sa bond sabse important hai?
questions.explanation: Disulfide bonds hair ki strength aur structure ke liye sabse important chemical bonds hote hain, jo chemical treatments se break aur reform hote hain.

questions.question: Telogen effluvium kis type ki hair loss condition hai?

options.B: Temporary hair loss due to stress or shock

questions.explanation: Telogen effluvium ek temporary hair loss condition hai jo stress, trauma ya hormonal changes ke baad hota hai.

questions.question: Keratin treatment products mein commonly kaun sa chemical as preservative aur straightener use hota tha?
questions.explanation: Formaldehyde pehle Keratin treatments mein common tha, par ab uske health risks ki wajah se alternatives use hote hain.

questions.question: Formaldehyde-free Keratin treatments mein kaun se compounds use hote hain jo similar results dete hain?
questions.explanation: Glyoxylic acid aur uske derivatives formaldehyde-free formulas mein use hote hain for smoothing effects.

questions.question: Keratin treatment apply karte waqt stylists ko kaun sa Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) pehenna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Chemical fumes se bachne ke liye gloves, mask aur proper ventilation bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Keratin treatment products ko store karte waqt kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Cool, dry place par tightly sealed

questions.explanation: Products ki effectiveness maintain karne ke liye unhe cool, dry place par tightly sealed rakha jaana chahiye.

questions.question: Product ki Shelf Life expire hone ke baad use karne se kya ho sakta hai?

options.C: Product ki effectiveness kam ho sakti hai ya allergic reactions ho sakte hain

questions.explanation: Expired products apni effectiveness kho sakte hain aur skin irritation ya allergic reactions ka cause ban sakte hain.

questions.question: Keratin treatment products mein 'Hydrolyzed Keratin' ka kya role hai?

options.C: Hair shaft mein penetrate karke strength aur smoothness dena

questions.explanation: Hydrolyzed Keratin small molecules mein broken hota hai jo hair shaft mein penetrate karke damage ko repair aur strengthen karta hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko Keratin product se allergy ho jaaye toh kya immediate action lena chahiye?

options.B: Product ko turant wash off karna aur doctor ko consult karna

questions.explanation: Allergic reaction hone par product ko turant remove karna aur medical help seekhna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Keratin treatment ke baad kaun se shampoos avoid karne chahiye?

options.B: Sulphate aur Sodium Chloride containing shampoos

questions.explanation: Sulphate aur Sodium Chloride Keratin treatment ko wash out kar sakte hain, isliye unhe avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Keratin treatment ke liye flat iron ka ideal temperature range kya hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: Keratin ko seal karne ke liye high heat (200-230°C) ki zaroorat hoti hai, hair type ke according adjust karna hota hai.

questions.question: MSDS (Material Safety Data Sheet) kis liye important hai?

options.B: Product ke ingredients aur safe handling procedures ki information ke liye

questions.explanation: MSDS chemical products ke safe handling, storage, aur emergency procedures ki detailed information provide karta hai.

questions.question: Smoothing treatments mein 'neutralizer' ka kya role hota hai?

options.B: Hair bonds ko re-form karna after straightening

questions.explanation: Neutralizer chemical straightening ke baad hair bonds ko re-form karta hai, jisse hair ki new shape set ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Kiski wajah se Keratin treatment ke fumes client aur stylist dono ke liye harmful ho sakte hain?
questions.explanation: Formaldehyde aur uske releasing agents heating par fumes generate karte hain jo respiratory aur eye irritation cause kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Kon sa ingredient Keratin treatment ke baad hair ko moisture aur shine provide karta hai?
questions.explanation: Natural oils jaise Argan aur Coconut Oil hair ko deep conditioning aur shine dete hain.

questions.question: Re-bonding cream mein kaun sa chemical hair bonds ko break karne ke liye use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Re-bonding creams mein Thio compounds jaise Ammonium Thioglycolate disulfide bonds ko break karte hain, allowing hair to be reshaped.

questions.question: Keratin treatment products ki pH level kya honi chahiye for optimal results?
questions.explanation: Keratin treatments often work best in a slightly acidic to neutral pH range to smooth the cuticle without harsh chemical damage.

questions.question: Stylist ko apne work area mein proper ventilation kyu maintain karna chahiye Keratin treatment ke dauran?

options.A: Taaki products jaldi dry ho jaaye
options.C: Fumes aur chemical vapours ko disperse karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper ventilation chemical fumes ko disperse karta hai, jo respiratory issues cause kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Kon sa tool Keratin treatment ke product ko hair par evenly distribute karne ke liye best hai?
questions.explanation: Fine-tooth comb product ko evenly distribute karta hai aur excess product ko remove karta hai.

questions.question: Client consultation ka first step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Client ki needs, medical history, aur hair goals ko discuss karna
options.D: Client ke hair ko wash karna

questions.explanation: Consultation mein client ki needs aur medical history samajhna sabse pehle zaroori hai.

questions.question: Patch test kitne time pehle karna chahiye Keratin treatment se?
questions.explanation: Patch test 24-48 hours pehle kiya jaata hai taaki kisi bhi allergic reaction ka pata chal sake.

questions.question: Agar client ka hair heavily damaged ya brittle hai, toh Keratin treatment ke liye kya advice denge?

options.B: Treatment ko avoid karna ya conditioning treatment recommend karna

questions.explanation: Heavily damaged hair par Keratin treatment aur damage kar sakta hai; pehle conditioning zaroori hai.

questions.question: Pregnant ya breastfeeding client ko Keratin treatment recommend karna chahiye?

options.C: No, safety reasons ki wajah se avoid karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Pregnant ya breastfeeding women ke liye chemical treatments avoid karna better hai due to potential fume exposure.

questions.question: Keratin treatment se pehle client ke hair ko kis shampoo se wash karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Clarifying shampoo hair se build-up aur residues ko remove karta hai, jisse Keratin product better penetrate karta hai.

questions.question: Hair porosity check karne ka ek simple method kya hai?

options.B: Ek strand ko pani ke glass mein dalna

questions.explanation: Pani mein float karna low porosity, beech mein rehna normal, aur sink karna high porosity indicate karta hai.

questions.question: Client ke hair ki texture (fine, medium, coarse) ko assess karna kyu important hai?

options.A: Isse product ki quantity decide hoti hai
options.B: Isse flat iron ka temperature aur product processing time adjust hota hai
options.C: Isse client ki age pata chalti hai
options.D: Isse hair cutting style decide hoti hai

questions.explanation: Hair texture ke according flat iron temperature aur processing time adjust karna zaroori hai taaki damage na ho aur results ache milein.

questions.question: Agar client ka hair recently colour ya highlight hua hai, toh Keratin treatment kab karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Colour ke 1-2 weeks baad Keratin treatment karna better hai, taaki colour settle ho jaaye aur hair ko rest mil jaaye.

questions.question: Client consultation ke dauran 'realistic expectations' set karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Taaki client ko pata ho ki treatment se kya results expect karne hain aur kya nahi
options.C: Taaki stylist ko kam mehnat karni pade
options.D: Taaki client ko jaldi ghar bhej sakein

questions.explanation: Realistic expectations set karne se client dissatisfaction avoid hoti hai aur unhe pata hota hai ki treatment se kitna frizz control aur smoothness milega.

questions.question: Scalp analysis ke liye kaun sa tool use kiya ja sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Magnifying lamp ya scalp camera scalp ki condition ko clearly observe karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Agar client ki skin sensitive hai, toh patch test kahan karna chahiye?

options.B: Behind the ear ya inner elbow par

questions.explanation: Behind the ear ya inner elbow sensitive areas hote hain jahan allergic reactions easily detect ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Keratin treatment se pehle hair ko kitna dry karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Most Keratin treatments require hair to be 80-100% blow-dried to ensure proper product absorption aur activation.

questions.question: Client ke previous chemical treatments ki information lena kyu important hai?

options.A: Isse product ki price decide hoti hai
options.B: Isse hair ki current health aur future treatment ki suitability pata chalti hai
options.C: Isse client ki loyalty pata chalti hai
options.D: Isse stylist ka experience pata chalta hai

questions.explanation: Previous chemical treatments hair ki integrity ko affect kar sakte hain, isliye unki information lena zaroori hai taaki further damage avoid ho.

questions.question: Agar client ka hair bahut oily hai, toh pre-treatment wash mein kya special consideration leni chahiye?

options.B: Clarifying shampoo se do baar wash karna
options.D: Hair ko wash hi nahi karna

questions.explanation: Oily hair ko clarifying shampoo se do baar wash karne se oil aur build-up completely remove ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Client ki lifestyle (e.g., swimming, frequent workouts) Keratin treatment ke results ko kaise affect kar sakti hai?

options.C: Salt water ya sweat Keratin ko jaldi wash out kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: Salt water, chlorine, aur excessive sweating Keratin treatment ki longevity ko kam kar sakte hain, isliye client ko aftercare advice dena zaroori hai.

questions.question: Hair elasticity test kaise perform karte hain?

options.B: Ek wet hair strand ko stretch karte hain

questions.explanation: Wet hair strand ko stretch karke check karte hain ki woh kitna stretch hota hai aur apni original length mein wapas aata hai.

questions.question: Client consultation form mein kaun si information record karna mandatory hai?

options.B: Medical history, allergies, previous treatments, and desired results

questions.explanation: Client ki medical history, allergies, aur previous treatments ki information safety aur effective treatment ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Keratin treatment product apply karne se pehle hair ko kitne sections mein divide karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: 4-6 sections mein divide karne se product evenly aur systematically apply hota hai.

questions.question: Keratin product apply karte waqt scalp se kitni doori maintain karni chahiye?
questions.explanation: Product ko scalp se thoda door rakhna chahiye taaki irritation avoid ho aur hair roots ko heavy na lage.

questions.question: Product saturation ka kya matlab hai Keratin treatment mein?

options.B: Hair par product ko evenly aur thoroughly apply karna
options.C: Hair ko sirf roots par apply karna

questions.explanation: Proper product saturation ensures ki har hair strand ko Keratin treatment ka full benefit mile.

questions.question: Keratin product ko hair par kitne time tak process hone dena chahiye?
questions.explanation: Processing time product brand aur hair type par depend karta hai, usually 30-60 minutes.

questions.question: Keratin product ko hair par apply karne ke baad blow-dry kyu karte hain?

options.B: Product ko activate aur hair mein seal karne ke liye
options.C: Hair ko damage karne ke liye
options.D: Hair ko colour karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Blow-drying product ko activate karta hai aur excess moisture ko remove karta hai, preparing hair for flat ironing.

questions.question: Flat ironing karte waqt har section par kitni baar pass karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Hair type (fine/damaged vs. coarse/curly) ke according 7-10 passes zaroori ho sakte hain Keratin ko properly seal karne ke liye.

questions.question: Flat ironing karte waqt hair section kitna thin hona chahiye?

options.B: As thin as possible (1/8 to 1/4 inch)

questions.explanation: Thin sections ensure ki heat aur product har strand tak properly pahunche, jisse best results milte hain.

questions.question: Agar hair bahut fine ya damaged hai, toh flat iron ka temperature kya hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: Fine ya damaged hair par low temperature use karna chahiye taaki further damage avoid ho.

questions.question: Keratin treatment ke dauran fumes se bachne ke liye kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Achha ventilation aur exhaust fan use karna

questions.explanation: Proper ventilation chemical fumes ko remove karta hai, jisse stylist aur client dono safe rehte hain.

questions.question: Keratin treatment application mein 'root to tip' application ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Product ko roots se start karke tips tak evenly spread karna

questions.explanation: Root to tip application ensures ki poore hair strand par product evenly distribute ho.

questions.question: Excess Keratin product ko hair se remove karna kyu important hai?

options.B: Excess product hair ko greasy aur heavy bana sakta hai

questions.explanation: Excess product hair ko greasy aur heavy bana deta hai, jisse results ache nahi aate.

questions.question: Keratin treatment ke baad first wash kab karna chahiye?

options.B: 24-72 hours baad, product brand ke according

questions.explanation: Product brand ke instructions follow karna zaroori hai, usually 24-72 hours tak hair ko dry aur straight rakhna hota hai.

questions.question: Keratin treatment ke dauran hair ko colour kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: No, Keratin treatment aur colour ko separate sessions mein karna chahiye
options.C: Only if it's a root touch-up

questions.explanation: Keratin treatment aur hair colour ko ek saath karne se hair damage ho sakta hai ya results compromise ho sakte hain. Ideally, colour treatment se 1-2 weeks pehle ya baad mein karna chahiye.

questions.question: Keratin treatment ke baad hair ko straight rakhne ke liye client ko kya advice denge?

options.A: Hair ko tight ponytail mein bandhna
options.C: Pehle kuch din tak hair ko loose aur straight rakhna

questions.explanation: Pehle kuch din tak hair ko bend ya crease hone se bachana zaroori hai taaki treatment set ho jaaye.

questions.question: Keratin treatment ke baad hair dry karne ke liye kaun sa dryer use karna chahiye?

options.B: Normal blow dryer with medium heat

questions.explanation: Normal blow dryer with medium heat aur paddle brush se hair ko smooth dry karna chahiye.

questions.question: Keratin treatment ke liye sectioning karte waqt, kis area se start karna best hai?
questions.explanation: Nape area se start karna stylist ko control deta hai aur systematic application ensure karta hai.

questions.question: Agar client ka hair thin ho raha hai, toh Keratin treatment ke dauran flat iron passes kitne hone chahiye?

options.D: Flat iron use hi nahi karna

questions.explanation: Thinning hair par kam flat iron passes use karne chahiye aur low temperature par taaki hair ko aur damage na ho.

questions.question: Keratin treatment aur Hair Smoothing treatment mein kya main difference hai?

options.A: Keratin sirf colour change karta hai
options.B: Keratin frizz reduce karta hai, smoothing hair ko chemically permanently straight karta hai

questions.explanation: Keratin treatment semi-permanent frizz control aur smoothness deta hai, jabki smoothing ya re-bonding chemically hair bonds ko break karke permanently straight karta hai.

questions.question: Chemical hair straightening mein kaun se bonds break hote hain?
questions.explanation: Chemical straightening mein disulfide bonds ko break kiya jaata hai, jisse hair ki shape change hoti hai.

questions.question: Hair re-bonding mein 'neutralizer' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Hair bonds ko re-form aur fix karna new straight shape mein

questions.explanation: Neutralizer broken disulfide bonds ko re-connect karta hai, hair ko uski new straight shape mein lock karta hai.

questions.question: Kon sa hair type chemical straightening ke liye least suitable hai?

options.B: Chemically over-processed ya extremely damaged hair

questions.explanation: Over-processed ya damaged hair chemical straightening se aur damage ho sakta hai aur break ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Hair smoothing treatment se pehle patch test kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Product ki quantity check karne ke liye
options.B: Client ki skin reaction ya allergy check karne ke liye
options.C: Hair colour check karne ke liye
options.D: Product ki expiry date check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Patch test allergic reactions ya skin sensitivity ko detect karne ke liye zaroori hai chemical products se pehle.

questions.question: Re-bonding cream apply karte waqt scalp se kitna distance maintain karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Chemical burns aur scalp irritation se bachne ke liye scalp se thodi doori maintain karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Hair smoothing treatment ke baad hair colour kar sakte hain?
questions.explanation: Smoothing treatment ke baad hair ko rest dena zaroori hai, 2-3 weeks baad colour karna better hai.

questions.question: Permanent hair straightening mein hair bonds ko break karne ke liye kaun sa agent use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Reducing agents jaise Ammonium Thioglycolate disulfide bonds ko break karte hain, jisse hair reshape ho paata hai.

questions.question: Re-bonding ke dauran hair ko stretch karna kyu important hai?

options.B: Hair ko new straight shape mein align karne ke liye
options.C: Hair ko dry karne ke liye
options.D: Hair ko damage karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Hair ko gently stretch karke straight position mein rakhna zaroori hai taaki neutralizer apply hone par woh usi shape mein set ho.

questions.question: Thermal reconditioning mein flat iron ka kya role hai?

options.B: Hair ko heat se damage karna
options.C: Hair bonds ko break karne ke baad heat se reshape karna

questions.explanation: Thermal reconditioning mein chemical cream se bonds break hone ke baad, flat iron se heat apply karke hair ko permanently straight shape mein reshape kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar client ka hair previously relaxed ya permed hai, toh smoothing treatment karna chahiye?

options.B: No, it can cause severe damage and breakage

questions.explanation: Previously relaxed ya permed hair par smoothing treatment karne se severe damage aur breakage ho sakta hai kyuki hair already chemically compromised hota hai.

questions.question: Hair softening treatment ka primary goal kya hai?

options.B: Hair ki natural texture ko thoda relax aur frizz ko control karna

questions.explanation: Hair softening treatments hair ko permanently straight nahi karte, balki frizz ko control aur natural texture ko relax karte hain.

questions.question: Hair smoothing treatment ke baad hair wash karne ke liye kis type ka water use karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Lukewarm water hair aur scalp ke liye gentle hota hai aur treatment ko preserve karta hai.

questions.question: Agar smoothing treatment ke baad hair mein breakage ho rahi hai, toh iska kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.A: Client ne hair wash nahi kiya
options.B: Over-processing ya high heat use karna

questions.explanation: Over-processing (product ko zyada time tak rakhna) ya excessive heat se hair structure damage ho sakta hai, leading to breakage.

questions.question: Hair smoothing treatment se pehle hair ko conditioner lagana chahiye?

options.B: No, clarifying wash ke baad conditioner avoid karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Clarifying wash ke baad conditioner use karne se hair par ek film ban jaati hai jo product penetration ko hinder kar sakti hai.

questions.question: Kon sa tool hair smoothing cream ko evenly apply karne ke liye sabse useful hai?
questions.explanation: Tint brush product ko precisely apply karta hai aur fine-tooth comb evenly distribute karta hai.

questions.question: Keratin treatment ke baad hair ko kitne din tak wash nahi karna chahiye (minimum duration)?
questions.explanation: Most Keratin treatments require a waiting period of 24-72 hours before the first wash to allow the treatment to fully set.

questions.question: Keratin treatment ke baad kaun se products use karne chahiye aftercare ke liye?
questions.explanation: Sulphate aur Sodium Chloride-free products Keratin treatment ki longevity ko maintain karte hain.

questions.question: Agar client swimming pool mein jaata hai, toh Keratin treatment ko protect karne ke liye kya advice denge?

options.B: Swim cap pehenna aur hair ko pehle rinse karke conditioner lagana

questions.explanation: Chlorine Keratin treatment ko damage kar sakta hai, isliye protection zaroori hai.

questions.question: Keratin treatment ke baad hair ko tight hairstyles (ponytails, buns) se kyu bachana chahiye?

options.A: Isse hair colour fade ho jaata hai
options.B: Isse hair mein creases ya bends aa sakte hain jab treatment set ho raha ho
options.C: Isse hair zyada oily ho jaata hai
options.D: Isse hair growth ruk jaati hai

questions.explanation: Pehle kuch din tak hair ko tight bandhne se creases ban sakte hain, jo treatment ke results ko affect karte hain.

questions.question: Keratin treatment ke results kitne time tak rehte hain?
questions.explanation: Keratin treatments semi-permanent hote hain aur 2-6 months tak chalte hain, depending on hair type aur aftercare.

questions.question: Agar client ko Keratin treatment ke baad bhi frizz dikhe, toh kya troubleshoot karenge?

options.A: Bolenge ki treatment fail ho gaya
options.B: Aftercare routine check karenge, product application aur flat ironing technique review karenge
options.C: Zyada heat use karne ko bolenge
options.D: Hair ko colour karne ko bolenge

questions.explanation: Frizz ke reasons aftercare, product application ya iron temperature mein ho sakte hain, unhe check karna chahiye.

questions.question: Keratin treatment ke baad hair colour kab karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Treatment ke 2 weeks baad colour karna hair ki health aur colour retention ke liye better hai.

questions.question: Agar client ka hair Keratin treatment ke baad oily ya heavy feel ho, toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Excess product use kiya gaya ya product properly rinse nahi hua

questions.explanation: Oily ya heavy feel ka matlab ho sakta hai ki product build-up hai ya hair ko theek se rinse nahi kiya gaya.

questions.question: Keratin treatment ke baad hair ko blow-dry karne ke liye kaun sa brush best hai?
questions.explanation: Paddle brush hair ko smooth aur straight dry karne mein help karta hai, Keratin results ko enhance karta hai.

questions.question: UVA/UVB rays Keratin treatment ko kaise affect kar sakte hain?

options.C: Treatment ko fade aur hair ko damage kar sakte hain
options.D: Hair ko zyada shiner banate hain

questions.explanation: Sun exposure (UVA/UVB) Keratin treatment ko fade aur hair ko damage kar sakta hai, isliye UV protection zaroori hai.

questions.question: Client ko Keratin treatment ke baad hair masks kitni baar use karne chahiye?

options.B: Once a week ya as needed for deep conditioning

questions.explanation: Hair masks deep conditioning provide karte hain aur treatment ki longevity ko enhance karte hain.

questions.question: Agar client ko Keratin treatment ke baad scalp irritation ho, toh kya advise denge?

options.B: Anti-itch cream lagana aur doctor ko consult karna

questions.explanation: Scalp irritation chemical reaction ka sign ho sakta hai, isliye professional medical advice lena zaroori hai.

questions.question: Keratin treatment ke baad hair extensions lagana safe hai?

options.B: Wait for 1-2 weeks to allow the hair to settle

questions.explanation: Hair extensions lagane se pehle hair ko settle hone dena chahiye aur scalp par pressure avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Troubleshooting mein agar results uneven aaye hain, toh kya possible reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Uneven product application ya inconsistent flat ironing

questions.explanation: Uneven results typically uneven application ya inconsistent heat application ki wajah se hote hain.

questions.question: Client ko Keratin treatment ke baad kon sa pillowcase use karne ki advice denge for better results?
questions.explanation: Silk ya satin pillowcase hair par friction kam karte hain, frizz ko reduce karte hain aur treatment ki longevity ko extend karte hain.

questions.question: Keratin treatment ke baad hair fall zyada ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Professional advice seekhna, hair specialist ya trichologist se consult karna

questions.explanation: Excessive hair fall ek serious issue ho sakta hai jo underlying health conditions ya improper technique ki wajah se ho sakta hai, isliye professional help lena zaroori hai.
